Wall-E Robot

Wall-E is the original robot variant in this project, featuring a complete ROS 2 ecosystem with sensor integration and autonomous capabilities.

    • Control System
    • Feedback System

See the Getting Started for initial setup instructions.

For development workflows, see Workflow and Commands.
